subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Scott, spoken on 1913-05-07
subcodes.first_line: You are the flowers of Paris and the cause of my happiness. All the inhabitants of this city are either thinking of industry or wealth or they are chasing after the worldly pleasures
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
